Non disclosure agreement ref m e benson and urban wind turbines™
Non disclosure agreement 1
Parties: 3
[ meb  engineering  &  commercial  services  ltd ],
Agreement:
Definitions
[(a)   any  information  disclosed  by  [or  on  behalf  of]  the  discloser  to  the  recipient [during  the  term  /  before  the  end  of  the  term]  (whether  disclosed  in  writing,
[(b)   the terms [(but not the existence)] of this agreement;
[(c)   [ specify other confidential information here ];]
Term
Confidentiality obligations
The recipient agrees and undertakes:
That  it  will  keep  all  confidential  information  strictly  confidential  and  will  not disclose  any  part  of  it  to  any  other  person  without  the  discloser's  prior  written consent[,
That it will use the same degree of care to protect the confidential information as it  uses  to  protect  its  own  confidential  information  of  a  similar  nature,
[(c) that it will act in good faith at all times in relation to the confidential information,
Notwithstanding clause [3.1(a)],
Is known to the recipient before disclosure by [or on behalf of] the discloser,
Is  or  becomes  publicly  known  through  no  act  or  default  on  the  part  of  the recipient;
[(c) is  obtained  by  the  recipient  from  a  third  party  in  circumstances  where  the recipient  has  no  reason  to  believe  that  there  has  been  a  breach  of  a  duty  of confidence.
Warranties
Termination
Upon termination:
[(a) the recipient will immediately cease to use the confidential information; and]
All  the  provisions  of  this  agreement  will  cease  to  have  effect,
General
Neither party may without the prior written consent of the other party assign, transfer,
This agreement is made for the benefit of the parties,
This agreement  constitutes the entire agreement between the parties  in relation to the subject matter of this agreement,
Neither party  will have  any remedy in respect  of any misrepresentation  (whether written or oral) made to it upon which it relied in entering into this agreement].

5 nsk confidentiality agreement for suppliers
Non-disclosure agreement
Nsk europe limited,
[supplier name], registered number [company reg. no.
Background
The parties agree as follows:
Definitions
Confidential information
The fact that discussions and negotiations are taking place concerning the purpose and the status of those discussions and negotiations;
The terms of this agreement;
All  confidential  or  proprietary  information  relating  to:
Confidential information does not include information which:
Which  is  or  subsequently  becomes  public  knowledge  or  publicly  available  through  no  fault  of  the receiving party;
Which  is  known  by  the  receiving  party  prior  to  the  time  of  receipt,
Which  is  lawfully  obtained  by  the  receiving  party  from  a  third  party  and  is  not  subject  to  a  similar restriction on disclosure;
Which is independently developed by receiving party; or
The parties agree in writing is not confidential.
Confidentiality obligations
Keep the confidential information secret and confidential,
Not use or exploit the confidential information in any way except for the purpose;
Not disclose or make available any confidential information in whole or in part to any person except as expressly permitted by and in accordance with this agreement;
To establish and maintain adequate security measures to safeguard the confidential information from unauthorized access or use.
Exceptions
Notwithstanding  clause  3.
To its and its affiliate’s representatives,
As may be required by an order of any court of competent jurisdiction or governmental body in which case the receiving party shall,
Return or destruction of confidential information
Upon  the  disclosing  party’s  written  request,
Clause 5.1 of this agreement shall not apply to:
Confidential  information  held  electronically  in  archive  or  back-up  systems  which  are  not  otherwise reasonably retrievable by the representatives of the receiving party or its affiliates;
Copies  of  confidential  information  which  must  be  retained  by  the  receiving  party  pursuant  to applicable law.
Intellectual property
Each party reserves all rights in its confidential information.
No representation
Inadequacy of damages
No obligation to disclose or continue discussions
Term and survival of confidentiality obligations
No partnership or agency
General
Assignment  and  other  dealings.
Entire agreement.
Variation.
Waiver .
Severance.
Notice.
Third party rights.
Governing law.
Jurisdiction.
5bfbcabf0627e70bdcfc5b32 nda ready4s
Mutual non-disclosure and confidentiality agreement
Recitals
The parties intend to enter into discussions regarding a potential future business relationship; and
Therefore, it is agreed as follows:
Definitions and interpretation
In this agreement: confidential information means:-
Information relating to the disclosing party regarding its business, partners,
Those portions of analyses, compilations, studies,

Information of a commercially sensitive nature relating to the disclosing party obtained by observation during any visits to the disclosing party’s premises but subject always to the proviso set out in clause.
The commitment
Safekeeping
Limited internal dissemination
Prior to the disclosure of any confidential information to any such personnel,
Non-disclosure to third parties
Save as otherwise permitted herein, a receiving party shall not,
Disclose the confidential information to any third party, either directly or indirectly; or
Disclose to any person: -
The fact that discussions or negotiations are taking place between the parties;
The content of any such discussions or negotiations;
Any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect to the purpose; or
That confidential information has been requested or received,
Discussions through authorised representatives only
It is understood that all communications regarding the parties’ discussions,
Exclusion from confidential information
These terms and conditions will not apply to any confidential information which:
Is in or becomes part of the public domain or is or otherwise becomes public knowledge by any means other than by breach by a receiving party or their personnel of any obligation contained herein;

Was previously or is at any time hereafter disclosed to a receiving party by any third party having the right to disclose the same provided that such source is not known to the receiving party to be bound by a confidentiality agreement with,
Is released from the provisions of this undertaking by prior written consent given by a director or authorised representative of the disclosing party;
Was otherwise independently acquired or developed by the receiving party without violating its obligations hereunder.
Return of confidential information
The receiving party shall, immediately upon receipt of notice to that effect:
Return to the disclosing party all confidential information (including all copies held);
Destroy those portions (and all copies) of any analyses, compilations, studies,
Expunge and destroy any confidential information from any computer,
No responsibility for information provided
Breach of undertaking
Notices
Any notice or other communication given or made under this agreement shall,
If delivered by hand, at the time on the date of actual delivery; or
If sent by fax, with a confirmed receipt of transmission from the receiving machine,
The provisions of this clause shall not apply in relation to the service of documents.
